text.title: Laravel Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for scaffolding a layered Laravel CRUD slice.

step.name: scaffold-skeleton
step.action: Run `php artisan make:controller Api/V1/OrderController --api --resource --requests`. Run `php artisan make:resource OrderResource`. Run `php artisan make:policy OrderPolicy --model=Order`.

step.name: fill-form-requests
step.action: In `StoreOrderRequest::rules()` + `UpdateOrderRequest::rules()`, add Jakarta-style constraints. In `authorize()`, call `$this->user()->can('create', Order::class)`.
step.output: Form Request classes with rules + auth.

step.name: create-service
step.action: Create `app/Services/OrderService.php` with constructor injection of Eloquent model via DI. Each method that writes multiple records uses `DB::transaction(...)`.

step.name: fill-resource
step.action: Override `toArray($request)` with explicit field selection. Use `whenLoaded` for relationships. Add `with($request)` for top-level meta.

step.name: wire-controller
step.action: Controller method body: `return new OrderResource($this->service->create($request->validated()));`. Add `$this->authorizeResource(Order::class)` in `__construct`.
step.decision-gate: If controller method >20 lines or contains Eloquent::query(), STOP and extract.

step.name: register-policy-and-test
step.action: Register OrderPolicy in AuthServiceProvider::$policies. Write Feature tests (HTTP) + Unit tests for the Service.
